post.content:
Offers from Google, Uber, Amazon. I've mentioned my interview preparation journey in the below screenshots. I've also written my interview experience in separate posts for each company, also compensation posts.

Interview Experience Links - 
https://leetcode.com/discuss/interview-experience/1658957/Google-or-SDE-2-or-L4-or-Bangalore-or-India-or-November-2021-Offer
https://leetcode.com/discuss/interview-experience/1639865/Uber-or-L4-or-Bangalore-or-India-or-Virtual-Onsite-or-November-2021-Offer
https://leetcode.com/discuss/interview-experience/1658404/Facebook-or-E4-or-London-or-Virtual-Onsite-or-November-2021-Reject
https://leetcode.com/discuss/interview-experience/1639773/Sharechat-or-SDE-2-or-Bangalore-or-Virtual-Onsite-or-July-2021-Offer-Reject

Compensation Links - 
https://leetcode.com/discuss/compensation/1639867/Uber-or-L4-or-Bangalore-or-India-or-Accepted
https://leetcode.com/discuss/compensation/1534308/amazon-sde2-bangalore-india-accepted
https://leetcode.com/discuss/compensation/1658953/Google-or-L4-or-SDE-2-or-Bangalore-or-India-or-Accepted

Read the screenshot for my preparation journey. Previous post was removed by Leetcode, hence reposting it again.

![image](https://assets.leetcode.com/users/images/43291eb3-df10-4fef-8c8e-2f2571c9c1e2_1641200786.4250808.jpeg)

https://leetcode.com/discuss/compensation/1662724/Rippling-or-SDE2-or-Bangalore\nPeople are moving out of faangmula due to work and some old decade people still seeing faang as some dream .\npeople need to grow up and stop seeing old decade mnc as dream company

Mad respect for taking the time and effort to write such a detailed post. Thanks a lot.\nCan you tell how did you manage to get so many nice companies to interview you. Did you apply by referral or career site etc?\nI am in the same boat as you were, just got reached out by Google out of the blue, and don\'t want to interview first with them. Can use some practice. :)
Whats the difference between machine coding and low level design? Both sound similar?\n
Thank you for sharing your experience and congratulations! Your post will help more other guys who wants to join FAANG.

Thanks a lot for making this post,just one help would you mind sharing resources for machine coding,lld and hld ,and will python or js work for these rounds as most of these resources in java\nAgain congratulations

Sir, thank you for articulating your journey so well. This is going to help me and so many others in the leetcode/SWE community. Thank you. I just wanted to know from you if leetcode is enough for the coding rounds at companies like Google, Uber or is competitive programming experience (like Codeforces, Codechef) necessary to crack the rounds? And are you a competitive programmer yourself? I ask this as it will help me direct my preparation efforts better. Appreciate your response. Thank you.
Can you share the link of the preparation resources.
wait so you spent a total of 9 months preparing?
Are we expected to write "working" code in LLD? If so are we allowed to use C++ instead of Java?
Thank you so much for sharing your experience out! it\'s pretty helpful and insightful.\nHappy 2022, and congrats!
